content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于3月13日17:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年3月27日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【预购纪行：共轭命途】
● 原定于 3 月 23 日 9:00 至 5 月 4 日 9:00 期间限时开放的预购纪行「共轭命途」活动时间有所调整，对此我们深感抱歉。调整后具体如下：
● 在 4 月 6 日 9:00 至 5 月 18 日 9:00 期间，预购纪行「共轭命途」限时开放！
    ○ 购买纪行需要「源液」×1980。购买后，随每日登录逐步解锁，累计可额外获得：「银芯」×20000、「流明之芯」×30、「原型视界」×1、「循环母版」×1、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×100。
    ○ 早购福利截止 4 月 20 日 9:00，在此前购买可额外获得：专属奖励纪念头像「命运织者」、「无形者的请柬」×10！
战斗
● 钥令「酒馆之门」现已支持在「调查」中使用。
    ○ 酒馆之门：生成 1 张「莉雅的硬币」置入弃牌堆。「莉雅的硬币」：抽 2 张牌并获得 2 算力，保留、消耗。
 
二、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了唤醒体「徐」灵塑适性的中毒提高效果，以及对「人型」敌人的伤害减免及伤害增幅在 3 月 9 日更新后失效的问题。
● 修复了命轮「踏过泥泞的玫瑰」在战斗中的描述错误的问题。
● 修复了使用「时序逆行」时，唤醒体「莫丝」的追击「涡！流！弹！」伤害异常偏低的问题。
 
【关卡】
● 修复了「意识潜游：诸事如常」的关卡「朋友大收集」中，在事件「失落的快乐」选择选项后，会错误地显示事件「群鸦之歌」的图片和描述的问题。
 
【显示】
● 修复了「守密人档案」中更换头像后，其它头像会在更换头像界面关闭前短暂地错误显示为更换后头像的问题。
● 修复了「调查数据」关闭时，队伍唤醒体的立绘会在界面关闭前错误地提前消失的问题。
● 修复了头像「温柯尔·大型终端」的名称错误地被写为「温柯尔·台式终端」的问题。
● 修复了在消耗「循环母版」对 SSR 命轮叠位后，于玩法活动「默斯克斯的呼唤」中交换获得限定 SR 命轮「被囚禁的疯狂」时，展示动画错误显示为此前被叠位的 SSR 命轮的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「珈伦」立绘中餐盘错误显示白边的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「卡茜亚」的表情显示错误的问题。
● 修复了角色活动唤醒「溺祸漩涡」背景图片中，左下角英文显示错误的问题。
 
【相位对弈】
● 修复了唤醒体「莫丝」的技能「漩流护身」获得的延迟狂气不受空虚状态影响的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「莫丝」的技能「漩流护身」在装备命轮后不生效的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「莫丝」的狂气爆发升级效果会在装备命轮后不生效的问题。
● 修复了命轮「理智明灯」在缠绕状态结束后仍然未能生效的问题。
● 修复了命轮「玉兰之饵」在装备后描述中的痴醉层数显示错误的问题。
● 修复了预组模式「编队」界面中，「快速编队」和「挑战」按钮被错误调换位置的问题。
 
三、本地化
● 在韩语语言设置下，「教学」、「功能解锁」介绍弹窗和游玩引导的文本现已由人工译者提供翻译。 
● 修复了在繁体中文语言设置下，部分唤醒体的「超限爆发」描述存在多余文本的问题。
● 修复了在英语语言设置下，「调查行动」星辰篇第二章剧情文本中的部分拼写和标点错误的问题。

**V2.4.3.2 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on March 13 at 17:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on March 27, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
1. Event
[Pre-Order Archives: Conjugated Fates]
● We sincerely apologize for the schedule adjustment to the limited-time pre-order archives "Conjugated Fates," originally planned from 9:00 on March 23 to 9:00 on May 4. The updated details are as follows:
● From April 6 at 9:00 to May 18 at 9:00, the pre-order Archives "Conjugated Fates" is available for a limited time
○ Purchasing the Archives requires "Silver Prime" ×1980. After purchasing, rewards are gradually unlocked with each daily login, and you can additionally earn a cumulative total of: "Silver" ×20000, "Luminous Core" ×30, "Prototype Horizon" ×1, "Timeloop Copy" ×1, "Dreamspark" ×25, "Dreamshard" ×100.
○ Early purchase benefits end at 9:00 on April 20. Purchase before then to receive additional exclusive rewards: commemorative avatar "Moirae Weaver" and "Formless One's Invitation" ×10
Battle
● Posse "Tavern's Opening" can now be used in "Investigation".
○ Tavern's Opening: Generate 1 "Leah's Coin" and place it into the Discard Pile. "Leah's Coin": Draw 2 cards and gain 2 Arithmetica, Retain, Consume.
 
2. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed an issue where the Poison enhancement effect of Awakener "Xu's" Soulforge Aptitude, as well as the DMG Reduction and DMG Amplification against "Humanoid" enemies, became invalid after the March 9 update.
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Stepping Over the Muddy Roses" had an incorrect description in combat.
● Fixed an issue where the Pursuit "Vortex! Shell!" DMG of the Awakener "Vortice" was abnormally low when using "Time Reversal".
 
[Stage]
● Fixed an issue in the Stage "Friend Compendium" of "Psyche Deepdive: Eadem Omnia" where, after selecting an option in the event "Lost Joy," the image and description of the event "Song of Crows" would incorrectly appear.

[Display]
● Fixed an issue in "Keeper's Archives" where, after changing the avatar, other avatars would briefly and incorrectly display as the newly changed avatar before the avatar change screen was closed.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakeners' illustrations in the team would incorrectly disappear before the "Investigation Data" interface was closed.
● Fixed an issue where the avatar "Winkle·Large Terminal" was incorrectly named "Winkle·Desktop Terminal".
● Fixed an issue where, after using a "Timeloop Copy" to Ascend an SSR Wheel of Destiny, the display animation incorrectly showed the previously Ascended SSR Wheel of Destiny instead of the limited SR Wheel of Destiny "Imprisoned Madness" obtained through exchange in the gameplay event "Call of the Moskstraumen."
● Fixed an issue where the dinner plate in Awakener "Karen's" illustration incorrectly displayed a white border.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Casiah" Emote was displaying incorrectly.
● Fixed an issue where the English text in the bottom-left corner of the Character Event Awakening "Maelstrom of Woe" background image was displaying incorrectly.
 
[Traphase]
● Fixed an issue where the Delayed Aliemus gained from Awakener "Vortice"'s skill "Vortex Shield" was not affected by the Void State.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Vortice"'s skill "Vortex Shield" would not take effect after equipping the Wheel of Destiny.
● Fixed an issue where the Exalt upgrade effect of Awakener "Vortice" would not take effect after equipping the Wheel of Destiny.
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Light of Intellect" failed to activate after the "Entwined" state ended.
● Fixed an issue where the Spellbound stack count displayed incorrectly in the description of the Wheel of Destiny "Magnolia's Lure" after equipping it.
● Fixed an issue in the All Pick mode "Lineup" interface where the "Quick Lineup" and "Challenge" buttons were incorrectly swapped.

3.Localization
● In the Korean language setting, the text for "Tutorial," "Feature Unlock" introduction popups, and gameplay guides is now provided by human translators
● Fixed an issue where, under the Traditional Chinese language setting, the "Over-Exaltation" description of some Awakeners contained extraneous text.
● Fixed an issue with certain spelling and punctuation errors in the "Investigation" Astral Reign Chapter 2 Story text under English language settings.

● 修复了唤醒体「徐」灵塑适性的中毒提高效果，以及对「人型」敌人的伤害减免及伤害增幅在 3 月 9 日更新后失效的问题。
😲
Does the delay to the pre-order mean that the Archne patch is also going to be later?
oh goodie i dont mind the delay <:leigh_like:1468258513405870121>
